title: Faridabad、Haryana — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]

概述

Faridabad是Haryana的一个城市，人口约1,500,000。A major industrial city in Haryana and part of the Delhi NCR, known for its manufacturing and automotive industries.
